lines.content: Good morning this is Lucas with Einstein moving, how can I help you?

lines.content: Just the love seat will go back upstairs and then a couple of the IKEA shelves but some of them will, they'll probably be an even split between upstairs and downstairs. lines.content: Gotcha. Okay. I do try to play it a little bit conservative when it comes to my estimate just to, you know, plan for the worst but expect the best kind of situation we do have an hour rate per mover of $107 per mover per hour and this does include everything we need for the move. So, trucks taxes insurances pads bands, wraps particular items and any tools if we do end up needing to assemble anything or reassemble anything all the tools for that as well.
